newOrderTemplate.description: Base fields on every 35=D. Sugar for templates.D. tag → value map. Values are literal strings or {"generator": "<name>"}. Sugar for a fragment of set/setGenerated ops — need remove/group ops? use raw fragments (docs/PROFILE-WORKSPACE.md rung 2/3).

templates.description: Raw template fragment refs per MsgType (rung 2; e.g. E:entry).

dictionaryOverlay.description: Extra overlay beyond flow params (patching standard tags etc.).

flowOrder.description: Flow dropdown order (unlisted flows follow alphabetically).

extraDimensions.description: Escape hatch: extra dimensions appended verbatim (compiled profile format).

goldens.description: Write golden/ wires per link×flow on build (pinned clock/seed) — config PRs diff as FIX.
